objective: Remove the multi-party Gate 0 attestation role constraints so every remaining external attestation is owner-signable, without weakening hash binding, live comment immutability, or artifact-completeness blockers.
claim_ceiling: Accepted E0 offline Gate 0 attestation-policy correction only: the four independence-role attestations (issue59_independent_review, issue59_holdout_custody, issue59_known_reference, issue61_independent_slo_review) and live role-separation validation are removed by explicit owner decision recorded in #305, leaving five owner-signable attestations. A contiguous blocked Gate 0 v8 successor preserves frozen v7 and every accepted artifact and readiness state. This does not accept any candidate, post or bind any attestation, change #59/#60/#61 semantic content, or permit source, scheduler, runtime, release, database, consumer, or Production data work.

requirements: the queued registration is merged on main before the preparation revision pins the activation base, reviewer, and frozen Local/CI corpus
the E0 implementation installs a content-addressed integration lease before changing the shared Gate 0 validator, its tests, candidate files, or successor files

the implementation removes only the four independence-role attestations and live role-separation checks; target-sha256 binding, byte-exact live comment verification, product-owner authorship, human-author, and no-ref-reuse rules remain mandatory

issue-59 and issue-61 candidate files drop only the deleted attestation entries and their role-flavored blocking reasons; every artifact-completeness blocker is preserved or reworded without a role requirement
Gate 0 v7 remains byte-for-byte frozen and a contiguous blocked v8 successor preserves every accepted artifact and readiness state with updated candidate hashes and attestation set
no candidate is accepted and no attestation status changes from missing

later_claim_dependencies: Owner sign-off of #59/#60/#61 still requires the Track A artifacts (golden program, source matrix, rights/budget/probe artifacts, TOPT baseline, policy bundle) plus live owner comments binding the final candidate hashes; D13 only makes those comments owner-authorable.
#294 remains a separate batch for descoping the frozen tree; D13 does not change SUCCESSOR_MANIFEST_PATHS.

required_strata: a chain whose five remaining attestations are all authored by the product owner passes live validation with no role-separation error
each removed independence-role key is rejected as an unknown external attestation key
a live approval comment missing the target SHA-256, edited after binding, authored by a bot, posted on the wrong issue, or reusing another role's comment ref is rejected
product-owner attestations still require the product-owner login
issue-59 and issue-61 candidates with the trimmed internal attestation sets validate; a candidate retaining a deleted internal attestation key fails closed
Gate 0 v7 byte mutation or a non-contiguous successor is rejected

source_ceiling: No network source, credential, Vault, database, object-store, scheduler, runtime, release, consumer, or Production data operation is authorized.

release_activation.reason: D13 changes only offline Gate 0 attestation authorization policy and cannot activate a source, runtime, schedule, consumer, release, or data flow.

negative_controls: any removed independence-role attestation key accepted anywhere in the manifest chain

a live approval accepted without the target SHA-256 in its exact bytes, with edited bytes, from a bot author, from a non-product-owner login on a product-owner key, or reusing another role's comment ref
a candidate file retaining a deleted internal attestation key or dropping an artifact-completeness blocker
accepting any candidate or flipping any attestation status while every Track A artifact blocker remains
mutating Gate 0 v7 bytes, accepted artifacts, or readiness while rebinding the Gate 0 validator
combining this policy correction with #294 frozen-tree descoping, candidate semantic changes, or any source, scheduler, runtime, release, database, consumer, or data-path work

allowed_evidence_readers: Gate 0 sign-off preparation for #59/#60/#61 and the #294 successor descope batch; no candidate acceptance, source, runtime, release, or Production authorization

invalidation: Changing the retained attestation key set, live comment verification rules, candidate hash bindings, Gate 0 successor binding, path authorization, or corpus requires a new prepared revision before implementation.
Any attempt to combine this policy correction with candidate acceptance, attestation posting, #294 descoping, or semantic changes to #59/#60/#61 requires separate authorization.
rollback: Revert only the D13 attestation-policy change, tests, corpus fixture, Gate 0 v8 successor, v7 frozen-tree proof, lease, and E0 evidence; do not mutate v7 or earlier manifests, accepted artifacts, issue lifecycle state, or historical governance evidence.
